category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular IoT device compliance comparison for export from China to Ukraine.

title.en: China-to-Ukraine Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (NKRZI / UkrSEPRO)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入乌克兰：NKRZI / UkrSEPRO合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入烏克蘭：NKRZI / UkrSEPRO合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China wireless and IoT device documentation against Ukrainian NKRZI conformity declaration and UkrSEPRO UR mark requirements under the Law on Electronic Communications, covering radio conformity declaration, EMC (DSTU EN harmonised standards via DSSU), electrical safety (230 V / 50 Hz, Type C/F), local Ukrainian importer obligation, and CERT-UA cybersecurity scrutiny under Decree 518.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国无线及物联网设备文件与乌克兰《电子通信法》下NKRZI符合性声明及UkrSEPRO UR标志要求的差距对照，涵盖无线电符合性声明、电磁兼容（通过DSSU的DSTU EN协调标准）、电气安全（230V/50Hz，C/F型插头）、本地乌克兰进口商义务及第518号令下CERT-UA网络安全审查。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國無線及物聯網裝置文件與烏克蘭《電子通訊法》下NKRZI符合性聲明及UkrSEPRO UR標誌要求的差距對照，涵蓋無線電符合性聲明、電磁相容（通過DSSU的DSTU EN協調標準）、電氣安全（230V/50Hz，C/F型插頭）、本地烏克蘭進口商義務及第518號令下CERT-UA網路安全審查。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, NKRZI conformity declaration, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current Ukrainian regulations, applicable DSTU standards, labelling requirements, and market-entry obligations with qualified regulatory professionals before importation or sale in Ukraine. Given the ongoing conflict in Ukraine, supply-chain, logistics, and banking conditions should be independently assessed.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、NKRZI符合性声明、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在进口或于乌克兰销售前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行乌克兰法规、适用DSTU标准、标注要求及市场准入义务。鉴于乌克兰当前局势，应独立评估供应链、物流及银行条件。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、NKRZI符合性聲明、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在進口或於烏克蘭銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行烏克蘭法規、適用DSTU標準、標注要求及市場准入義務。鑒於烏克蘭當前局勢，應獨立評估供應鏈、物流及銀行條件。

answer_first.en: NKRZI mandatory conformity declaration with UR mark (not substitutable by CE DoC or CCC), DSTU EN harmonised standards for radio and EMC testing (EN test reports accepted as technical evidence but a separate UR declaration is still required), DSTU IEC 62368-1 electrical safety for 230 V / 50 Hz / Type C/F, appointment of a local Ukrainian importer/authorised representative, and CERT-UA cybersecurity scrutiny under Decree 518 are the major compliance gaps compared with Chinese SRRC radio type approval, CCC certification, and GB standards. CCC is not recognised in Ukraine. Ongoing conflict creates significant practical risks for supply chain, logistics, and banking.
answer_first.zh: 与中国SRRC无线电型式核准、CCC认证及GB标准相比，乌克兰的主要合规差距包括：NKRZI强制符合性声明附UR标志（不可由CE符合性声明或CCC替代）、DSTU EN协调标准（无线电及电磁兼容测试，EN检测报告可作为技术证明但仍需单独UR声明）、DSTU IEC 62368-1电气安全标准（230V/50Hz/C/F型插头）、指定本地乌克兰进口商/授权代表以及第518号令下CERT-UA网络安全审查。CCC在乌克兰不被认可。当前局势对供应链、物流及银行业务造成重大实际风险。
answer_first.zht: 與中國SRRC無線電型式核准、CCC認證及GB標準相比，烏克蘭的主要合規差距包括：NKRZI強制符合性聲明附UR標誌（不可由CE符合性聲明或CCC替代）、DSTU EN協調標準（無線電及電磁相容測試，EN測試報告可作為技術證明但仍需單獨UR聲明）、DSTU IEC 62368-1電氣安全標準（230V/50Hz/C/F型插頭）、指定本地烏克蘭進口商/授權代表以及第518號令下CERT-UA網路安全審查。CCC在烏克蘭不被認可。當前局勢對供應鏈、物流及銀行業務造成重大實際風險。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: annual or on major NKRZI / DSSU regulatory change
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag. human_reviewed requires named reviewer sign-off.
